title: WAF Command Injection Attack Blocked
description: Detects OS command injection attempts blocked by OCI WAF. Attackers inject system commands through web parameters. OWASP A03:2021 Injection.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI WAF Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs') and (('Action' = 'BLOCK') and ( (('Request URL' like '*; ls*' or 'Request URL' like '*; cat *' or 'Request URL' like '*; id*' or 'Request URL' like '*; whoami*' or 'Request URL' like '*; ping *' or 'Request URL' like '*; wget *' or 'Request URL' like '*; curl *' or 'Request URL' like '*| ls*' or 'Request URL' like '*| cat *' or 'Request URL' like '*| id*' or 'Request URL' like '*| whoami*' or 'Request URL' like '*`id`*' or 'Request URL' like '*`whoami`*' or 'Request URL' like '*$(id)*' or 'Request URL' like '*$(whoami)*' or 'Request URL' like '*$(/bin/bash*' or 'Request URL' like '*/bin/sh -c*' or 'Request URL' like '*cmd.exe /c*' or 'Request URL' like '*powershell -*')) or ('Rule Key' like '*932*') ))
falsepositives: Legitimate API endpoints that accept command-like parameters
